figures.caption: Figure 1: The FESTS framework begins with (1) which processes the SpRE and perception stream inputs to produce the two formal method-based results; (2) processes the explanation to improve readability for LLMs; and (3) packages this into a distributable data formats.
Table 1: Performance comparison across models and target lengths. Metrics: Frame F1 (F1f ), Exact Match (EM), and Segment F1 (F1s). Best results per column are in bold.
Figure 2: Average Performance across frame lengths. Blue = Overall F1, orange = Exact Match; shaded σ. Starred points denote the best-performing model for each frame length.
Table 2: Precision (P ), Recall (R), F1, and Exact-Match (EM) for each query type. Values are averaged across 8-, 12-, and 16-frame lengths.
